systems.name: terrain_generation
systems.description: 7-stage pipeline: fBm noise → erosion → hydrology → biomes → soil → resources
known_issues: Desert biome dominates (40-55%) across all seeds — may indicate tuning needed
tilemap.rs at 2515 lines needs data-driven TerrainDef refactor (see ARCHITECTURE.md)

systems.name: ecs_villager_ai
systems.description: Villager behavior: hunger, farming, gathering, building, sleeping, fleeing
known_issues: Villagers are omniscient (see Pillar 2 design gap in game_design.md)
Per-villager memory not implemented — design docs exist in docs/design/pillar2_emergence/

systems.name: building_autobuild
systems.description: Auto-build: placement scoring, construction, demolish, outposts
known_issues: game/build.rs at 2306 lines approaching split threshold

systems.name: event_system
systems.description: Random events: drought, wolf surge, bountiful harvest, plague, migration
known_issues: Wolf events require Spring season multiplier (0.5x) + low threat_score → rarely fire in 12K ticks
Drought requires grain >= villagers*5 buffer in Summer — this threshold is never met at 12K ticks
events:[] in all 3 evaluation seeds at tick 12000 (possible but concerning — 84% chance of no wolves)
No diagnostics JSON field for threat_score — hard to observe event readiness

systems.name: pipe_water
known_issues: THREE water systems still coexist: WaterMap (legacy), PipeWater (new), Terrain::Water (biome). Consolidation pending.

systems.name: simulation_atmosphere
systems.description: Wind, moisture, vegetation, day/night, seasons, soil fertility
known_issues: simulation.rs split completed — ARCHITECTURE.md refactor priority 1 is DONE
Moisture chain: water_surface → evaporation → transport → precipitation is underverified

systems.name: pathfinding
systems.description: A* per-villager, NavGraph hierarchical, FlowField shared destinations

systems.name: particle_system
systems.description: Construction dust, mining sparkle, wind flow, weather particles
known_issues: FAILING TEST: construction_dust_particles_spawn — test expects yellow-brown dust (Color 220,200,100) but none spawn in 20 ticks with seeded game
Particle spawn is gated on rng.random_range(0..4)==0 (25% per tick); test may need more ticks or deterministic RNG

systems.name: rendering
known_issues: game/render.rs split completed — ARCHITECTURE.md refactor priority 4 is DONE (partially)
render/mod.rs at 1300 lines, shared.rs at 864 — further splitting may be needed
